parsed.name: TIA SUKHNANNI
parsed.headline: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
parsed.summary: Full-stack developer with hands-on experience building and shipping real-world web and mobile applications using MERN stack. Delivered production- level backend features and frontend revisions across agri-tech, healthcare, and content platforms, with a focus on RESTful API design, database architecture, and end-to-end feature delivery.
education: B.Tech in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence | JK Lakshmipat University (JKLU) - Jaipur - 8.826/10
experience: January 2026 - January 2026 | Jaipur | , - Developed a decentralized Web3 web application under rigorous time constraints during a fast-paced hackathon environment. - Acquired practical expertise in Web3 architecture, including the integration and deployment of blockchain smart contracts.
